name: SubDTextureCoordinateType
summary: ON_SubDTextureCoordinateType identifies the way ON_SubDMeshFragment texture coordinates are set from an ON_SubDFace.

enum_values.name: Unpacked
enum_values.summary: Each SubDFace uses the unit square in texture space.

enum_values.name: Packed
enum_values.summary: The face's pack rect is used to set fragment texture coordinates. When possible, adjacent quads with the same ON_SubDFace::PackId() value are assigned adjacent rectangles in texture space.

enum_values.name: Zero
enum_values.summary: All ON_SubDMeshFragment texture coordinate values are zero.

enum_values.name: Nan
enum_values.summary: All ON_SubDMeshFragment texture coordinate values are ON_DBL_QNAN.

enum_values.name: FromFaceTexturePoints
enum_values.summary: All ON_SubDMeshFragment texture coordinate values are set by barycentric interpolation of ON_SubDFace.TexturePoint() values.

enum_values.name: FromMapping
enum_values.summary: Texture coordinates are set from an ON_TextureMapping and transformation specified by ON_SubD::TextureMappingTag(). In all other cases, ON_SubD::TextureMappingTag() can be set, but is ignored.
